label: Text Annotation
description: Visual annotation node — passes input through untouched. Useful for documentation/comments embedded in the canvas.

settings.name: text
settings.label: Annotation
settings.placeholder: Free-form text to display on the canvas

ai.whenToUse: When you want to label, comment, or visually group nodes — never as part of the data flow.
ai.examplePrompt: add an annotation that says 'Step 1: ingest customer data'
ai.promptHints: Text nodes never transform data; downstream nodes see the same input the text node received.
